install_msg:
Imagechecker installed!
See **[p]help imagechecker** for commands after loading the cog. `[p]help imgcheckcmds` for config and other useful commands. 
See the [**Github page**](<https://github.com/Flip-volunteers/vol-cogs>) for quick start setup.
name: imagechecker
short: check images for spam via a settable list
description: Allows one to upload images to a filter in order to scan and block similar images uploaded from users.
